flow-definition.description: Build a debian package for SapMachine on linux_ppc64le.<!-- Managed by Jenkins Job Builder -->

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: GIT_TAG_NAME
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: The Git tag to create a debian package from.

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: PUBLISH
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: When set to true, the resulting packages will be published.
